hooks.command: test -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/pipeline/checker-findings.json" || echo "[orchestrator] WARNING: checker stopped without writing findings to .claude/pipeline/checker-findings.json"
test -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/pipeline/reviewer-findings.json" || echo "[orchestrator] WARNING: reviewer stopped without writing findings to .claude/pipeline/reviewer-findings.json"
